productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Sid Black Trousers
description: "Mail By Aniket Keshi & Syed, on 25 April 2012" CompositionSolid black trousers made of 100% cotton, with flat front, side pockets, buttoned pockets at the back with appliqué d brand badge above the right pocket, reinforced stitch detailing on the crotch area, zippered and buttoned closure, and loops on the waist to hold a beltFittingComfortWash carePre-soak the garment before washPreferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not attempt to remove stains by spot washingFlat dry or drip dry on hanger and avoid wringingPreferably steam ironA famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and indian terrain makes it all the more easier with its classy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of fabrics to offer a comfortable, fresh feel, this trouser makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40 cmHeight: 6.2', Waist: 32&rdquo
